subcodes.first_line: O thou daughter of the Kingdom! Thy letters were received. Their contents indicated that thy mother has ascended the invisible realm, that thou hast remained alone.
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دختر ملکوت نامه هایت رسید و از مضمون معلوم گردید که والده محترمه ات صعود
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @development of capacity and readiness, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
